name: Harvest Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 (6 oz.) can frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
1 (6 oz.) can frozen lemonade concentrate, thawed
1 (6 oz.) can frozen pineapple juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 4-quart saucepan.
2. Simmer over low heat for 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Lift out the cloves and cinnamon sticks and discard them.
4. Serve hot. If desired, serve punch in a scooped-out pumpkin shell.
